message:
fix(ci): clone asupersync in all workflows (path dependency of fsqlite-core)

Fixes #189 — CI fails because frankensqlite's fsqlite-core crate has a
path dependency on asupersync, which was not being cloned. Add the
asupersync checkout step alongside every existing frankensqlite checkout
across ci.yml, release.yml, conformance.yml, e2e-full.yml, and audit.yml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Checkout frankensqlite (path dependency)
         run: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git ../frankensqlite
 
+      - name: Checkout asupersync (path dependency of fsqlite-core)
+        run: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git ../asupersync
+
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
